---
title: "ABI Summer School 2026"
description: "Materials for the Summer School 08 - 19 June 2026"
toc: true
---

## ABI Summer School 2026
The aim is to provide comprehensive training on bioinformatics computational resources, and domain-specific tools and workflows to improve participants' proficiency in executing, interpreting, and communicating analyses for major bioinformatics studies, with a special focus on genomics.

---

## Course Content:

### Week 1: 

#### Linux 
[Linux Content Link 1](insertlinkhere)

#### R coding content

#### Intro to NGS



---

### Week 2 

#### R/Biology Streams

#### Human Genomics

#### Pathogen Genomics

#### Metabolomics



---

## Trainer Info

| Trainer | Institute | Module |
|---------|--------|-----------------|
| Trainer 1 | Institute 1 | Module 1 |
| Trainer 1 | Institute 1 | Module 1 |
| Trainer 1 | Institute 1 | Module 1 |
| Trainer 1 | Institute 1 | Module 1 |
| Trainer 1 | Institute 1 | Module 1 |
| Trainer 1 | Institute 1 | Module 1 |
| Trainer 1 | Institute 1 | Module 1 |
